since_last: 80% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +5.06%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 80% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.70% · BTC -1.15% · Gold +1.18% · Nasdaq100 +1.67%. 80% of 84 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +5.06%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +5.06%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.25%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CEVA is the standout at +10.64%
cards.body: Leaders: CEVA +10.64%, AMD +9.63%, ANET +8.66%, VRT +8.04%, INOD +6.96%. Laggards: AVAV -3.96%, INTU -3.05%, HON -2.02%, SAP -1.70%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.02% at $160.35
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.02% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
